response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional technical depth across multiple domains and demonstrates strategic thinking through open-source leadership and mentoring. However, the position requires C1-level German proficiency (he lists Basic), and his background is primarily in product companies rather than IT consulting advisory roles. As a current re:cinq staff engineer, he understands their culture and clients, but lacks explicit team leadership experience and expertise in UML, security/compliance considerations, and formal project management—all stated requirements. Technical capability alone may not translate to the advisory and client-facing leadership demands of this role.
strengths: Extensive software development expertise across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with proven ability to learn new domains rapidly
Demonstrated leadership through open-source project founding (GISCollective), community engagement, and creating educational programs (workshops, courses, Selenium training)
Already embedded at re:cinq with 1+ year tenure, familiar with company culture, clients, and tech stack (AI agents, MCP, full-stack development)
concerns: German language proficiency listed as 'Basic' but position requires C1 minimum—critical gap for consulting role likely serving German-speaking clients
No demonstrated team management or people leadership experience; background is primarily individual contributor and senior engineer roles, not team lead or management positions

Missing key consulting skills: no UML expertise, security/risk/compliance background, formal requirements management, or IT consulting/advisory experience—primarily product company and startup background
